title: The Nation – July - August 2026 - Part 218
content:
from an alligator.

two skulls, skin peeled away in the swamp, the proclamation                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           You Can’t Hide them how to run away roaring at his prey the way his ancestors roared eight million years ago; “We’re going to teach with the boils of the plague; the alligator skeleton, bone stripped of hide, harvesting the souls of border-crossing orange-pickers as if they burst showing at the movie house; the Grim Reaper and his ruby eyes, scythe The patch: Alligator Alcatraz on a red banner, the blockbuster movie now Shame handing her the patch like a souvenir postcard of flamingos in the Everglades.

the patch on his sleeve. Officer Martínez tears the Velcro from his shoulder, the two-drink minimum or the wriggling strippers of Miami. She asks about his lip. I did it for the money, he says, lamenting all the twenties he flung at a brown-skinned boy in his twenties, mustache struggling to sprout from he says, the gashes on his cheek proof of the scuffle with another guard, the car so he can confess to Courtney in her pigtails.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          I got fired today, Officer Martínez, guard at Alligator Alcatraz, Special Housing Unit, idles every time a car guns through the gate and away from Alligator Alcatraz.

the single syllable, taps the sign, gesticulates to the man behind the wheel in pigtails at the whiteboard teaching the word Shame, she enunciates Courtney the witness raises up a sign that reads Shame. Like a teacher in the mangroves and say the name of her father in his chain-link cage:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Justo.

by Arianne the tour guide, who walked off her job in Little Havana to stand survivors of the last great extinction, bored by the speeches at the vigil, Near the gate, on Route 41, an alligator drowses in a drainage ditch, his kind crawls across the floor, his belly stabbed by kidney stones, then disappears.
